summary: Comprehensive testing of Rhino Drishti app new features: Twitter accounts monitoring, document upload facility, enhanced daily brief with watermark PDF generation. Backend APIs working well (94.9% success rate), frontend fully functional with responsive design.

minor_bugs.issue: Enhanced daily brief sections (national_news, international_news, twitter_highlights, uploaded_insights) not populated in response
minor_bugs.impact: New sections appear empty in daily brief
minor_bugs.details: Brief generation logic may need data seeding or the sections are empty due to lack of data in collections

minor_bugs.issue: Key developments not in enhanced format with source links
minor_bugs.impact: Missing source URLs and timestamps in key developments
minor_bugs.details: Key developments returned as strings instead of objects with source_url and timestamp fields

passed_tests: Twitter accounts API returns 13 defense accounts including @adgpi, @IAF_MCC, @indiannavy
Uploaded documents API returns documents list with proper structure
Document upload API accepts PDF/Word/Excel files and extracts text
Daily brief PDF generation works with proper headers and watermark support
Twitter feeds API returns feeds with limit parameter support
Frontend upload page renders with dropzone and file selection
Document upload UI shows AI analysis status and processing indicators
Mobile responsive design works with collapsible navigation
All navigation links functional across desktop and mobile
PDF generation accessible from Daily Brief page
Theme toggle and search functionality operational
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Investigate why enhanced daily brief sections (national_news, international_news, twitter_highlights, uploaded_insights) are not populated and ensure key_developments include source links. May need to seed data or fix brief generation logic.
